Uncertainty. Do you know what uncertainty means? You should. Well, it's the opposite of certainty. Certainty means I know for sure. Uncertainty is I'm not sure. I don't know. And look, you live in a world and so does your client of uncertainty. There's 800 TV channels on this planet or at least in the United States alone puking uncertainty onto the customer, onto your prospect. Don't do it. Rates are going up. Money's tight. The economy's in trouble. One day it's good. One day it's bad. The market's up. The market's down. These people lost this. This company went bankrupt. The government's doing this. More regulation. We got this care and that care. Uncertainty is everywhere. And when uncertainty, you know, basically infiltrates your group, what are they going to do? They're going to think about it. They're going to put it off. They're going to talk about budgets. They're going to say your price is too high. They're going to say we're looking at other possibilities. We're going to put it off until a third quarter. This is uncertainty. And uncertainty breeds more uncertainty. Now the way I handle that is I confront it outright. What are you uncertain about? Do you think you're not going to be here next week? Next month? Three months from now? Three years? What if the economy does get worse? What if jobs go down? What if they quit hiring people? What if the government does this? You going to go out of business? You going to stop being in business? Are you going to stop growing? You have to literally push the uncertainty. Don't do it in an email. Don't do it in a text. You could do it with video or you could do it with articles. You remember all those things? Hey, I thought about you so I sent a link. See, what you want to do is share with people good news, positive news, expansion news, even doing the worst economies. Like even doing the worst unemployment routes. Still most people are working, but nobody tells anybody that. So you can do this with your blogs. You can do it with your articles. You can do it by participating in radio, TV, sending people links, passing on our cure ratings called Cure Rating. Other articles that are positive and sharing those with your customers as a way to build certainty. Not just in you, but in the economy, in themselves, in their company, and in their future. Handle the uncertainty problem because it can prevent you from getting your business done.
